Abstract base classes.
These are necessary to avoid circular imports between core.py and fields.py.
.. warning::
    This module is treated as private API.
    Users should not need to use this module directly.
annotationsc
Z	d	d
FieldABCz9Abstract base class from which all Field classes inherit.Nc

	SchemaABCz3Abstract base class from which all Schemas inherit.N)
